name: DEFECT/DAMAGED PACKAGE-CLEARANCE: King Plus Adult Dog Food - Beef 15kg
shortDescription: Fully balanced all natural dog food with beef protein and brewer's yeast for immune support. Carefully formulated by cat / dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult large breed dogs.
description: King Plus Adult Dog Food Beef , fully balanced all-natural dog food with beef protein and brewer's yeast for immune support. Carefully formulated by cat / dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult large breed dogs. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Protein ................. 18% Fat ....................... 7% Crude Cellulose (Fiber) ... 4% INGREDIENTS: Wheat, Corn, Processed Animal Protein, Wheat Middlings, Boncalit, Animal Fat, Dried Sugar Beet, Liver Flavour, Flaxseed, Salt, Dried Brewer?s Yeast. MINERALS: Calcium, Phosphorus, Sodium, Iodine, Zinc, Copper, Potassium Chloride, Iron, Selenium. VITAMINS: Vit. A, Vit. D, Vit. E, Vit. C, Vit. B1 - B2 - B3 (niacin) - B6 - B12 - B7 (biotin) - B9 (folic acid), Vit. K, Choline, Calcium Pantotetan. Key Features & Benefits High-Quality Beef Protein – Supports lean muscle maintenance and sustained energy for active lifestyles. Immune System Support – Enriched with brewer’s yeast and natural antioxidants to strengthen immunity. Omega Fatty Acids – Flaxseed provides Omega-3 & Omega-6 for healthy skin and a shiny coat. Rich in Fiber – Supports healthy digestion and optimal nutrient absorption. Large Breed Formula – Tailored nutrient profile for large breed adult dogs, supporting joint health and strong bones Why Choose King Plus Adult Dog Food – Beef? Specially formulated for large breed adults Delicious beef flavor your dog will love No artificial colors, flavors, or preservatives Balanced nutrition for strong immunity and healthy joints
